violations.description: Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Equipment/utensil was not air-dried or allowed adequate draining after sanitizing. Witnessed dish employee drying dishes with a yellow towel. Employee was pulling them off the rack as soon as they were out of the dishwasher and not allowing them to air dry.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Clean dishes were placed on yellow towels after washing.

Handling of clean equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not handled in a manner to prevent contamination of food-contact surface. Employee would dry multiple dishes with the same towel.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. The paper towel dispenser for the hand sink by the rice cookers was empty.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
